race.comment: Tough race to start the day. SHARBINO (11) three runs back have been encouraging and drops in weight from the good gate. Over raced mid race with a respectable third over 1600m at Kembla Grange. This is no tougher and expected to go close. LYON (9) is deep into the campaign and had excuses last start when snagged back from the wide draw to finish ninth over 1300m at Scone. Should handle the rise in trip and can overcome the awkward draw. Each-way. LOOK HERE (5) started fav when taken to the front for a fighting fifth over 1500m at Newcastle in a Super Maiden. Conditions suit and will prove hard to run down. MICROGRAVITY (2) has caught the eye in his two career runs and desperate for this trip now. Savaged the line with the 59kg when a tough second over 1450m at Quirindi. Looks up to this despite drawing out.
